历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 2191 → 1731 → 4673 → 4302 → 4395. In 2023, due to major restructuring (medical majors enrolling separately), the ranking significantly dropped to 4673. In 2024-2025, it stabilized in the 4300-4400 range, with a baseline of about 4395 in 2025. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for Physics Category/Science were 132 → 137 → 81 → 136 → 143 students respectively. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 111 students plus 34 for medical majors, totaling 145 students, an increase of 2 students (about 1.4%) compared to 143 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Member of C9 League, 985/211, Double First-Class; ranked 10th stably in the Soft Science Main Ranking from 2021 to 2026, consistently among the top universities in China, maintaining strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, within the reputation cycle, Xi'an Jiaotong University has not experienced significant negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 24th overall (relatively hot), with a comprehensive heat index of 1.84 million, and short video exposure at an upper-middle level. In 2023, there were somewhat negative evaluations due to dormitory issues, but in 2024, rumors about teacher ethics were clarified by police, and overall reputation remains stable. No records of enrollment gaps have been observed. It has 4 A+ disciplines: Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering, as well as 7 A disciplines including Computer Science and Technology and Materials Science and Engineering. Its engineering strength is top-tier nationally, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, aligning well with Xi'an Jiaotong University's flagship disciplines. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at around 313,000, easing competition pressure somewhat. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (not the home province), with Anhui's enrollment share at about 2.8% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's local enrollment share in Shaanxi is extremely low, with no regional protection or exclusion effect for Anhui candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4395, a slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2 students/+1.4%), a slight decrease in total candidates in Anhui Province, stable university reputation, and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, and taking into account the university's continuous appeal as a C9 top university to Anhui candidates and the heat of engineering majors, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward to about 4480, with a range of 4300-4800.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续较高，临床医学、口腔医学等专业尤其受到考生青睐。西安交通大学地处陕西省西安市，虽非长三角地区，但作为C9高校之一，其医学品牌效应 辐射全国，对安徽省考生仍具较高吸引力。2026年医学类招生专业新增口腔医学和普通临床医学（五年制），专业结构有所优化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势分析，2026年西安交通大学医学类在安徽省最低录取位次预测为5939名，波动区间为5760至6118名。较2025年6073名略有上升（位次数字减 小，竞争略加剧），主要受招生计划小幅缩减及医学报考热度持续影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Anhui Province over the past four years are: 2022: 9236 (planned 37 students), 2023: 5762 (planned 36 students), 2024: 5220 (planned 35 students), 2025: 6073 (planned 35 students). Rankings rose continuously from 2022 to 2024 (from 9236 to 5220), with increasing competition year by year; in 2025, rankings fell back to 6073, easing competition. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 34 students, a decrease of 1 student compared to 2025, and the slight reduction in enrollment has a minor upward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university (Class A). The university has a long history of medical education, with a strong medical faculty, outstanding advantages in clinical medicine, basic medicine and other fields, and has strong appeal to Anhui candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have maintained high popularity in recent years, with clinical medicine, stomatology and other majors particularly favored by candidates. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province. Although not in the Yangtze River Delta region, as one of the C9 universities, its medical brand effect radiates nationwide and still has high appeal to candidates in Anhui Province. In 2026, the medical enrollment majors add stomatology and general clinical medicine (five-year system), optimizing the professional structure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Anhui Province in 2026 is 5939, with a fluctuation range of 5760 to 6118. Compared to 6073 in 2025, it has slightly increased (ranking number decreases, competition slightly intensifies), mainly due to the slight reduction in enrollment plan and the continued popularity of medical majors.
